## Summary

Give the compact version first. Blog posts can be more narrative than docs pages, but should still help readers reach canonical reference pages quickly.

<Callout type="note" title="Reference context">
Use this callout to point readers to the stable concept, model, module, paper, or training-regime page.
</Callout>

## Context

Explain what changed, what was released, what paper appeared, or what confusion this post addresses.

## Main Idea

Explain the argument or interpretation. Link to canonical docs pages instead of duplicating stable definitions.

## Why It Matters

Explain the practical implication for readers.
